communications.subject: Propuesta Oficio Taller — Casa Los Cabos
communications.summary: Bilingual proposal delivered to Miguel Torres via Instagram DM. Proposal covers standalone residential 216sqm, Los Cabos. Architecture fee $30,000 USD. Payment: M1 40%, M2 30%, M3 30%. Budget constraint noted.
Client confirmed acceptance of proposal. Contract signing and M1 deposit ($12,000 USD) to proceed.

communications.subject: Ajuste de programa — presupuesto de construcción
communications.summary: Client notified that contractor pricing at $380K exceeds $200K budget. Scope reduction proposed: remove pool, reduce to 160sqm. Client approval requested before proceeding.
Client accepted scope reduction: pool removed, program reduced to 160sqm at revised $195K contractor estimate within budget.
